mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE AND p.status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert a INNER JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE AND a.status = 'UNCONFIRMED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert a INNER JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE AND a.status IN ('UNCONFIRMED', 'CONFIRMED')

SELECT p.panel_id, p.site_id, s.name AS site_name, p.name, p.status, p.last_communicated_at, COUNT(a.alert_id) AS unconfirmed_alert_count FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id LEFT JOIN alert a ON a.panel_id = p.panel_id AND a.status = 'UNCONFIRMED' WHERE GROUP BY p.panel_id, p.site_id, s.name, p.name, p.status, p.last_communicated_at ORDER BY CASE p.status WHEN 'OFFLINE' THEN 1 WHEN 'RISK' THEN 2 WHEN 'CAUTION' THEN 3 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, COUNT(a.alert_id) DESC, p.last_communicated_at DESC, p.panel_id DESC
